results.matched_effect_cluster: Learning to Rotate temporal-semantic rotary SIREN-DNN
results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Dual-branch SIREN-DNN maps continuous timestamps to per-dimension rotation angles IS the learned continuous pitch-bend RoPE offset δ_t mechanism.

results.matched_effect_cluster: Dynamic RoPE per-head per-token phase shift
results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Context-aware RoPE (CARoPE) with dynamic per-head + per-token phase shifts IS the per-band per-token pitch-bend learned offset.
EXACT TWIN — Walsh-Hadamard structured output projection with cross-head interaction IS the cross-band Hadamard harmonic mechanism.
HART Hadamard product attention with MKOI cross-band cross-spatial integration covers cross-band Hadamard interaction mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Hierarchical frequency-domain filtering + multi-scale partitioning IS the 4-band per-head spectral-allocation mechanism.
Frequency-aware + phase-aware token representations IS the per-band spectral + phase-bend combined mechanism.
Sparse spectral transformer with dynamic frequency-aware attention IS the per-band dynamic spectral allocation paradigm.
MFformer multi-frequency aggregation IS the multi-band per-head spectral aggregation paradigm.
